tools.name: groupItems.youtubeAnalyticsGroupItemsDelete
tools.description: Removes an item from a group.

tools.name: groupItems.youtubeAnalyticsGroupItemsList
tools.description: Returns a collection of group items that match the API request parameters.

tools.name: groups.youtubeAnalyticsGroupsList
tools.description: Returns a collection of groups that match the API request parameters. For example, you can retrieve all groups that the authenticated user owns, or you can retrieve one or more groups by their unique IDs.

tools.name: groups.youtubeAnalyticsGroupsUpdate
tools.description: Modifies a group. For example, you could change a group's title.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
